column1: # A curated list of gene symbols with strong
# cancer. Symbols only — annotated feature sets (COSMIC CGC
# licensed datasets and are not redistributed here. Gene symbols and their
# canonical "oncogene / tumor suppressor / dual role" classification are
# drawn from public literature reviews (Vogelstein et al. 2013; Bailey et al.
# 2018; Sondka et al. 2018). Commercial redistribution of the annotated
# upstream datasets requires a license from the owners.
# For dog (CanFam4) and cat (felCat9) workspaces we match by HGNC symbol;
# Ensembl uses aligned gene symbols across these species for orthologs.
